reviews.text:
A lovely little Mexican restaurant right on the historic Woodstock Square!!
Great food and modest prices.
We had a window seat so we could people watch the people walking around the Square while we ate.
The ceviche and chimichungas were fabulous!!
Friendly and fast service!

reviews.text:
We had a great experience at Mary’s. Our waitress was super friendly, playful, and attentive, which made the whole meal even more enjoyable.
Our family ordered a pork burrito that was so generous it easily made leftovers for a second meal. The chile rellenos were delicious—rich, melty cheese, the pepper cooked perfectly, and covered in a sauce with great flavor and just the right consistency.
My favorite dish was the enchiladas with mole. The mole sauce was excellent—deep, flavorful, and on the sweet side. And a big win for parents: my kids absolutely loved the beans!
We’ll definitely be back.
reviews.raw:
Holly P

reviews.text:
We stopped in at 4:50pm on a Friday night. Got a table just before the main rush. 20 minutes later, the dining room was packed.
Service was fast, prices were reasonable, and food was great!
I have the Enchiladas Mole. Best mole I've had. Neat to find out it was the building used in the Groundhog Day movie.

reviews.text: Came to town for groundhog days and stopped at this gem! The food was delicious, prices are fair and the portions we perfect. It's very clean inside and welcoming. Shout out to one of the hardest working servers I've ever seen. She was single handedly waiting on the entire, packed restaurant by herself and also bussing tables and somehow cleaning in-between. She did all of it with a smile and was great to us for our entire time here. Thank you so much, any time we're here we'll make it our place to grab food!

We have been here a few times and absolutely love this place.  The chips are really good / extra flakey, which holds the salsa ready well.  The SALSA is SO FREAKING GOOD.  I wish she bottled it, so I can take some home!
I got the Chicken Enchiladas Verde (again) and she got the Chicken Fajitas.  Though mine was as good as ever, she won the lunch with the better menu item.
So delicious.  This place is a GEM!

reviews.text: We visited Marys January 21 2025 for lunch and had the pleasure of being served by Martha. Our one special request was to please have guacamole with no onions which she quickly had prepared and served to us to our delight. The chips which we were told are made daily are quite good and great with the meal. The food was prepared as expected and tasted great.

Parking

I suspect in the warmer months, because of the quaint atmosphere that surrounds the cobblestone streeted square, parking might be more difficult to find close to the restaurant.

reviews.text: Great place for some awesome food. We had steak tacos, which were amazing, tamales and Enchiladas. And a seafood dish that was phenomenal. The service was a little on the slow side, but the restaurant was packed, so totally understandable. The food was hot when it arrived, so the wait was well worth it. If you come to the square to see the lights this holiday season,  grab some food at Mary's!

reviews.text: This was our 3rd time having lunch at Mary’s Mexican Grill, and each time has been a great experience. Their dishes are all bursting with authentic flavor, and it really sets them apart from your typical Mexican restaurant. I decided to branch out from my usual go-to items on the menu today, and I ordered the Ceviche. Initially, I was a little hesitant to order it, as it seems to be something that is hit-or-miss, depending where you go. Our server went above & beyond by insisting I let her bring out a sample plate to ensure I’d like it, prior to ordering. It was absolutely delicious - Extremely fresh ingredients & the presentation was very nicely done as well. We always enjoy their red & green sauces at the table, the homemade guacamole, and the street tacos. The homemade tortillas are my favorite, and while I’ve never ordered a taco I didn’t like there, I’d have to choose the pastor taco with cilantro, onion & lime as the best! Give this place a try & support a local small business that deserves to be here for years to come!
reviews.raw:
Brittany Hafferkamp
1 review · 1 photo

reviews.text: My husband and I stopped in for lunch. I had the chicken fajita and my husband had a beef burrito. We didn’t wait Long for the food, but even if we did, it was worth the wait. Martha was our waitress. She was very friendly. When the food was ready, she brought it. The food was hot and delicious. My husband and I had been searching for a good Mexican restaurant and we found it in Woodstock. We had been all over, but this one I give five stars. The food was hot. There was more than enough to eat. I had to take leftovers home. Martha was very friendly and wonderful. We definitely will be going back again.

reviews.text: When on a trip from Brooklyn, NY, to visit Woodstock's "Groundhog Day" sites, we stopped at Mary's Mexican Grill for lunch since it was the site of the diner portrayed in the movie. To our pleasure & surprise, it was so much more than a tourist stop -- our meals were excellent -- fresh & tasty. Our waitress made being there all the better -- she was warm & welcoming, serving all the tables while keeping the place spotless. We returned later in the day for dessert -- incredibly delicious & beautifully presented churros. Overall, a perfect stop in a perfect location!
reviews.raw:
Jeanmarie Brusati

reviews.text:
Great food. Great service and great people. I eat here at least once a week and I am never disappointed.  My favorite are the pork tacos but have never had a bad dish. The salsas are are very tasty and they offer a wide variety of spice levels. They now have margaritas AND taco pizza!!
I highly recommend you stop in and say hi to Martha, order some tacos and enjoy yourself.

reviews.text: This place is a true hidden treasure! My boyfriend and I discovered it for the first time and were pleasantly surprised by the efficiency of the staff despite their small numbers. The margaritas were absolutely delicious and we both thoroughly enjoyed our meal!
